---
title: "\'In the Fog, or, The Magician Hunt\'"
---

## \'In the Fog, or, The Magician Hunt\'
**Date:** 1878
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1878), 102-118.

### Notes

The writer is described as author of \'Marling Hall\' (a serial contributed anonymously to <i>London Society</i> in 1866) and \'William Hooper\'.  Neither seems to have appeared in volume form.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
